mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS id, c.contract_type As contractType, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.products_name AS productsName, c.company_name AS companyName, c.total_number AS totalNumber, c.total_amount AS totalAmount, c.dealed_amount AS dealedAmount, c.contract_status AS contractStatus, c.pay_full_time AS payFullTime, c.pay_bond_time AS payBondTime, c.contract_time AS contractTime, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, c.dept_id AS deptId, c.business_type AS businessType, r.payed_amount AS payedAmount, r.receive_date AS receiveDate, r. STATUS AS status, r.receive_amount AS receiveAmount, i.deal_amount AS dealAmount, t.content AS exitContractText, IF(DATEDIFF((IFNULL((SELECT MAX(re.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive re WHERE re.contract_id = c.id),NOW())),c.pay_full_time) >0,c.total_amount-r.receive_amount,0) AS overdueAmount, c.source FROM t_ctr_contract AS c LEFT JOIN t_apply_receive AS r ON c.id = r.contract_id LEFT JOIN t_apply_invoice AS i ON c.id = i.contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_text AS t ON c.id = t.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.contract_type = 'S' AND r.status='D' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY r.receive_date DESC
ORDER BY r.receive_date ASC
ORDER BY r.receive_date DESC

SELECT SUM(c.total_amount) AS sumTotalAmount, SUM(c.billed_amount) AS sumBilledAmount, SUM(r.receive_amount) AS sumReceiveAmount, SUM(IF(DATEDIFF((IFNULL((SELECT MAX(re.receive_date) FROM t_apply_receive re WHERE re.contract_id = c.id),NOW())),c.pay_full_time) >0,c.total_amount-r.receive_amount,0)) AS sumOverdueAmount FROM t_ctr_contract AS c LEFT JOIN t_apply_receive AS r ON c.id = r.contract_id LEFT JOIN t_apply_invoice AS i ON c.id = i.contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract_text AS t ON c.id = t.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.contract_type = 'S' AND r.status='D' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY r.receive_date DESC
ORDER BY r.receive_date ASC
ORDER BY r.receive_date DESC

SELECT contract_no contractNo, receive_date sellReceiveDate FROM t_apply_receive WHERE ( contract_no, receive_date ) IN ( SELECT contract_no, MAX( receive_date ) AS max_receive_date FROM t_apply_receive WHERE `status` = 'D'
and contract_no IN
#{sellContractNoList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY contract_no ) AND `status` = 'D' GROUP BY contract_no
